zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Hatton於大約1158年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親William de Hatton27歲，母親Erma Mathilda de Ville24歲。她於大約1170年與Osbert de Clinton在英國斯塔福爾阿敏頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1206年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Hatton于大约1158年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲William de Hatton27岁，母亲Erma Mathilda de Ville24岁。她于大约1170年与Osbert de Clinton在英国斯塔福爾阿敏頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1206年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Hatten
meanings: English: variant of   Hatton  . This surname is also common among African Americans.
North German: habitational name from the name of an area of marshland between Oldenburg and Bremen.

variants.name: Hattan
meanings: English and Scottish (Argyll): variant of   Hatton  .

variants.name: Aton
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Heath
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Hatton was born about 1158, in Warwickshire, England, her father, William de Hatton, was 27 and her mother, Erma Mathilda de Ville, was 24. She married Osbert de Clinton about 1170, in Amington, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died after 1206, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Hatton est née environ 1158, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Hatton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Erma Mathilda de Ville, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Osbert de Clinton environ 1170, à Amington, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée après 1206, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Hatton um 1158 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Hatton 27 und ihre Mutter Erma Mathilda de Ville 24. Sie hat um 1170 in Amington, Staffordshire, England Osbert de Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1206 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hatton è nata il circa 1158 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William de Hatton, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Erma Mathilda de Ville, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Osbert de Clinton circa 1170, nel Amington, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì dopo il 1206, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hattonが約1158年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Hattonは27歳，母Erma Mathilda de Villeは24歳であった。約1170年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアミントンでOsbert de Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1206年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hatton(이)가 대략 1158년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Hatton(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Erma Mathilda de Ville(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 영국 스태퍼드실르 아밍턴에서 Osbert de Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1206년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hatton nasceu aproximadamente 1158, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Hatton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Erma Mathilda de Ville, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Osbert de Clinton aproximadamente 1170, em Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1206, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Hatton родилась около 1158 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Hatton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Erma Mathilda de Ville, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Osbert de Clinton около 1170 г. в местности амингтон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла после 1206 г. в её родном городе.
